_comment: Golden conformance fixture: linear.issue.summary.v1 — canonical decision + profile -> expected rendered payload + receipt-mapping. Offline only; no live write.

canonical_decision.title: Adopt Postgres advisory locks for the watermark cursor
canonical_decision.summary: Use Postgres advisory locks to serialize watermark advancement across pollers; avoids the double-ingest race. Approved by platform team; implementation scoped to the polling runtime.

expected_rendered_payload.description:
